changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Formulation page (Page 7) to existing Virology notebook instances that don't have it
changeSet.sql: -- Insert Formulation page for each Virology notebook that doesn't have page 7 INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Formulation', 'Prepare viral product while recording formulation details. Document stabilizers, preservatives, virus concentration, buffer composition, batch number, and formulation notes for traceability.', 'Formulation - Prepare viral product and document formulation details', 7, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title LIKE '%Virology%' AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 7 );

rollback.sql: -- Remove Formulation pages added by this changeset DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE title = 'Formulation' AND page_order = 7 AND notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Virology%' AND is_template = false );
